name: Score Doubler
challenge_description: If any player makes birdie, they choose one opponent whose game points are canceled or doubled negatively.

name: Copycat
challenge_description: If two players complete the same style of achievement, both get +1 extra.

name: Comeback Card
challenge_description: Player currently last in game score gets +1 bonus if they complete any mission.

name: Pressure Cooker
challenge_description: If you miss a putt inside 4 feet, you cannot score mission points.

name: No Safe Plays
challenge_description: Layups do not count for mission rewards unless card explicitly allows it.

name: Target Golf
challenge_description: Approach shots on green earn +1 extra if player also avoids a 3-putt.

name: Revenge Hole
challenge_description: Player with lowest game points on previous hole gets first tie-break rights on this hole.

name: Team Trouble
challenge_description: If one player finds water, every other player making bogey or better gets +1.

name: Double Trouble
challenge_description: If two or more players fail their missions, all successful players gain +1 extra.

name: Rich Get Richer
challenge_description: Current game leader earns +1 if they complete any mission this hole.

name: Par 3 Panic
challenge_description: On a par 3, anyone missing the green cannot earn mission points.

name: The Collector
challenge_description: Any player who completes their mission and makes par or better steals 1 point from the current leader.

name: Heat Check
challenge_description: If the same player succeeds on three holes in a row, they gain +2 extra here.

name: Freeze Out
challenge_description: The previous hole's winner cannot earn bonus points from Chaos this hole.

name: Clutch Multiplier
challenge_description: Any made putt over 12 feet is worth +2 instead of +1 bonus.

name: Fairway Tax
challenge_description: Any player missing the fairway on a par 4 or 5 loses 1 game point unless their mission specifically involves recovery.

name: Commoner's Relief
challenge_description: Any player completing a Common card this hole gets +1 extra if they are currently last in game points.

name: Shared Glory
challenge_description: If every player completes their personal mission, everyone gets +2.

name: Only Pars Matter
challenge_description: Any player making par or better earns +1 game point, even if they fail their mission.

name: Tight Race
challenge_description: If two or more players tie for best game points on the hole, all tied players get +1 extra.

name: Fail Forward
challenge_description: Any player who fails their mission but still makes bogey or better gains +1.

name: Spotlight Hole
challenge_description: The current real-score leader cannot earn Chaos bonus points this hole.

name: No Sand Trouble
challenge_description: Avoid all bunkers on the hole.

name: Safe Layup
challenge_description: On a par 5, do not go for the green in two, then make bogey or better.

name: First-Putt Friend
challenge_description: Your first putt finishes within 3 feet of the hole.

name: Straight Ball
challenge_description: No shot on the hole ends out of bounds or in a hazard.

name: Par 3 Survivor
challenge_description: On a par 3, make bogey or better.

name: Stress-Free Finish
challenge_description: Hole out with one putt from inside 6 feet.

name: No Big Number
challenge_description: Score double bogey or better.

name: Respectable Hole
challenge_description: Hit either the fairway or green, and make bogey or better.

name: Safe Green
challenge_description: Miss the green, but leave yourself a chip or putt from a makeable position.

name: Advance and Survive
challenge_description: No full shot travels backward or sideways more than forward.

name: Good Number
challenge_description: Make net par relative to your normal level for the hole.

name: Fairway or Fringe
challenge_description: Finish in either the fairway, fringe, or green with your approach sequence.

name: Calm Hole
challenge_description: No penalty strokes and no putt longer than three attempts.

name: Green-Side Safety
challenge_description: If you miss the green, miss it green-side rather than short-sided or hazard-side.

name: No Reload
challenge_description: Do not hit any shot that requires an immediate re-hit.

name: Green-Side Exit
challenge_description: If you miss the green, leave your ball in a playable green-side position.

name: One Good Putt
challenge_description: Make at least one confident, cleanly struck putt on the hole, regardless of length.

name: No Cheap Mistakes
challenge_description: No penalty strokes, no whiffs, and no missed tap-ins.

name: Advance the Ball
challenge_description: Every full swing must clearly improve your position.

name: Soft Landing
challenge_description: Finish any approach or chip on the green or fringe.

name: Routine Hole
challenge_description: Play the hole without a rules debate, ball search longer than a minute, or a second-guess meltdown.

name: No Warm Blanket
challenge_description: You cannot use your favorite club on the hole.

name: Pressure Tee
challenge_description: You must tee off first regardless of honors.

name: No Practice Swing
challenge_description: No practice swings on any full shot this hole.

name: Putter Nerves
challenge_description: Any putt inside 5 feet must be holed cleanly with no gimmies.

name: One-Club Down
challenge_description: You must club down by one on one full swing this hole.

name: One-Club Up
challenge_description: On one full swing this hole, you must take one extra club and choke down or swing easy.

name: Silent Swing
challenge_description: No talking through your setup, shot, or immediate result. Stay silent until the ball stops.

name: Commit or Else
challenge_description: You must choose your club within 10 seconds once it is your turn.

name: No Rangefinder
challenge_description: You may not use a rangefinder or GPS on the hole.

name: Blind Confidence
challenge_description: You must pick your club before hearing anyone else's yardage or advice.

name: Texas Hold'em
challenge_description: If your ball is on the fringe, you must putt it rather than chip it.

name: Fairway Wood Jail
challenge_description: On one non-tee full swing, you must use a fairway wood or hybrid.

name: No Hero Clause
challenge_description: If you get into trouble, you must take the safe punch-out instead of a miracle shot.

name: Bare Minimum
challenge_description: You must make bogey or better or lose 1 game point. If you do, gain the listed reward.

name: Clean Finish
challenge_description: Once you reach the green, you may not leave any putt short of the hole.

name: No Driver Day
challenge_description: You may not use driver on this hole.

name: No Free Drops
challenge_description: You may not take optional free relief on this hole (mandatory relief still applies).

name: One Ball Only
challenge_description: You may not hit a provisional or second ball on this hole.

name: Spoiler Alert
challenge_description: Beat at least one player who is ahead of you in game points on this hole's real score.

name: Chase Mode
challenge_description: If the player before you completes their mission, complete yours too.

name: Outplay the Bombers
challenge_description: Have a shorter drive than someone else in the group but still tie or beat them on the hole.

name: Turn the Tables
challenge_description: After losing to at least one player on the previous hole, beat them here.

name: Shadow Game
challenge_description: Match your own mission and also beat your previous hole's real score.

name: Knockdown Artist
challenge_description: Declare one shot a low punch or knockdown before hitting it, then pull it off and finish bogey or better.

name: Caddie's Choice
challenge_description: Let another player choose your club for one shot, then finish double bogey or better.

name: No Glove, No Problem
challenge_description: Play the entire hole without a glove and finish bogey or better.

name: Three-Quarter Specialist
challenge_description: On one full swing, intentionally hit a three-quarter shot and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: Texas Wedge Life
challenge_description: Use putter from off the green at least once and finish bogey or better.

name: Called Bank Shot
challenge_description: Call that your chip or putt will use a slope, bank, or side contour, then execute it well enough to finish within 4 feet or hole it.

name: Eyes on the Prize
challenge_description: On one short putt inside 4 feet, hold your finish dramatically until the ball drops. Still make bogey or better.

name: Hero Pose
challenge_description: After one shot, hold a ridiculously confident pose until the ball lands. If the shot is acceptable and you finish double bogey or better, score it.

name: Club Flip Approved
challenge_description: After one clearly good shot, do a club twirl or flip. If the group agrees the shot earned it and you finish double bogey or better, score it.

name: Putt With Personality
challenge_description: Use an exaggeratedly serious pre-putt routine on one putt, then make it from 5 feet or more.

name: The Listener
challenge_description: You must take swing advice from another player on one shot. If you follow it and still finish double bogey or better, score it.

name: Flighted Finish
challenge_description: Hit one intentionally flighted wedge or short iron and keep it under control. Finish bogey or better.

name: Barely Legal
challenge_description: Use the strangest club in your bag for one reasonable shot and still finish double bogey or better.

name: Lucky Bounce Believer
challenge_description: Before one shot, call for a generous bounce or kick. If the ball gets one and you still finish double bogey or better, score it.

name: No Stepping Off
challenge_description: On one full shot, once you address the ball, you may not step off. Hit it and keep it in play. Finish double bogey or better.

name: Art Project
challenge_description: Attempt one intentionally shaped or creative shot that the group agrees was legitimate. If you pull it off and finish double bogey or better, score it.

name: Fairway Bet (Player Pick)
challenge_description: Pick any active player: will they hit the fairway?

name: Scramble Save
challenge_description: Will anyone miss the green and still save par?

name: Birdie Player Pick
challenge_description: Pick one player most likely to make birdie.

name: Bounce Back Call
challenge_description: Will the player with worst real score last hole make bogey or better here?

name: Hero Shot
challenge_description: Will someone attempt an aggressive line/carry/recovery and pull it off?

name: Chaos Prediction
challenge_description: Will the hole public Chaos card affect at least two players?

name: Sand Visit
challenge_description: Will anyone visit a bunker and still make bogey or better?

name: Clean Card
challenge_description: Will the entire group avoid penalty strokes this hole?

name: All Safe
challenge_description: Will every player keep their tee shot in play?

name: Blowup Pair
challenge_description: Will at least two players make double bogey or worse?

name: Best Ball Brain
challenge_description: Pick the player most likely to record the lowest real score on the hole.

name: Sand Save Alert
challenge_description: Will anyone get up-and-down from a bunker?

name: Hero or Zero
challenge_description: Will someone attempt a risky aggressive shot and pay for it with bogey or worse?

name: Mission Monster
challenge_description: Will at least three players complete their personal mission this hole?

name: Risk Pays Off
challenge_description: Will any player complete a Risk card this hole?

name: Clean Tee Shots
challenge_description: Will every player keep their first shot in play?

name: Mission Fail Rate
challenge_description: Will more players fail their mission than complete it?

name: Best Score Pick
challenge_description: Pick which player will post the best real score on the hole.

name: Bounce-Back Hole
challenge_description: Will any player who made double bogey or worse on the last hole make par or better here?

name: Green Parade
challenge_description: Will at least two players hit the green in regulation?

name: Trouble and Recovery
challenge_description: Will anyone find trouble and still make bogey or better?

name: Bonus Chaos
challenge_description: Will the Chaos card award or remove points from more than one player?

name: Bombs Away
challenge_description: Drive 260+ yards in play.

name: Hero Recovery
challenge_description: After a recovery shot from trouble, still make bogey or better.

name: Go For It
challenge_description: On a par 5, attempt to reach in two and finish double bogey or better.

name: Sand Wizard
challenge_description: Hole out from bunker or finish bunker shot inside 6 feet and make the putt.

name: No Fear
challenge_description: Carry water or a forced hazard and still make bogey or better.

name: Putt for Glory
challenge_description: Make your first putt from outside 20 feet.

name: Tight Window
challenge_description: Play through a narrow gap or intentional shape and finish without penalty.

name: Three Great Shots
challenge_description: Hit three consecutive quality shots on the hole.

name: Pressure Player
challenge_description: After another player completes a mission, complete yours too.

name: Risk It for the Biscuit
challenge_description: Use one extra-aggressive club choice and still make bogey or better.

name: Clean Bird
challenge_description: Make birdie with no bunker, no hazard, no penalty, and no lip-out misses.

name: Attack the Flag
challenge_description: Hit an approach inside 8 feet.

name: Hero Carry
challenge_description: Carry the most dangerous visible hazard on the hole and still make bogey or better.

name: Bunker Assassin
challenge_description: Get out of a bunker and finish inside 4 feet.

name: Full Send
challenge_description: Be longest in the group off the tee by a clear margin and stay in play.

name: Bounce-Back Birdie
challenge_description: After making bogey or worse on the previous hole, make birdie here.

name: Zero Panic
challenge_description: Recover from a terrible lie and still make bogey or better without a penalty.

name: Kill Shot
challenge_description: Have the best approach shot in the group and still convert par or better.

name: No Regrets
challenge_description: Take the aggressive line everyone says not to take, and succeed.

name: Par 5 Predator
challenge_description: On a par 5, put yourself in eagle-range by the time you reach the green.

name: Pure Strike Bonus
challenge_description: Hit the best-feeling full swing of the group and still make bogey or better.

name: Drain the Snake
challenge_description: Make a putt from 18 feet or longer for par or better.

name: Recovery Rope
challenge_description: From serious trouble, hit a recovery shot that both escapes danger and advances meaningfully.

name: Short-Sided Savior
challenge_description: Get up-and-down after leaving yourself short-sided around the green.

name: Carry Commander
challenge_description: Choose to carry the trouble instead of laying back, and pull it off.

name: One-Swing Turnaround
challenge_description: After a poor shot, immediately hit a great one and still make bogey or better.

name: Drivable Dream
challenge_description: On a drivable hole, take the aggressive tee shot and finish double bogey or better.

name: Laser Beam
challenge_description: Hit a full swing that finishes on your intended starting line and stays there.

name: Pin Seeker
challenge_description: On an approach where the safe miss is obvious, ignore it and attack the pin successfully.

name: Fairway Sniper
challenge_description: Hit fairway and finish drive in the longest third of the group.

name: Clutch Scramble
challenge_description: Get up-and-down from sand for par or bogey.

name: Aggressive Line
challenge_description: Carry a hazard or cut a corner intentionally and make bogey or better.

name: Pure Tee Ball
challenge_description: Drive 240+ yards in play.

name: Smart Golf
challenge_description: Hit the correct miss side on approach and still make par or bogey.

name: Bounce Back
challenge_description: After a bad tee shot, still make bogey or better.

name: Par 5 Pressure
challenge_description: On a par 5, reach the green in regulation and avoid a 3-putt.

name: Dart Board
challenge_description: Hit any approach inside 15 feet.

name: Fringe Genius
challenge_description: Miss the green but get down in two shots or fewer from just off the surface.

name: Pin High
challenge_description: Finish your approach pin-high, regardless of left/right miss.

name: Scramble Touch
challenge_description: Miss the green, chip inside 6 feet, then make the putt.

name: Big Putt Energy
challenge_description: Make a putt between 8 and 15 feet.

name: Fairway Pressure
challenge_description: Hit the fairway after another player already completed a drive-related mission.

name: Drive for Show
challenge_description: Finish with one of the two longest drives in the group and still make bogey or better.

name: Green Window
challenge_description: Hit the correct tier/section of the green as agreed by the group before the shot.

name: Scramble to Par
challenge_description: Miss the green and still make par with a chip and putt sequence.

name: Tee Shot Trust
challenge_description: Hit your tee ball in play and finish with one of the better two tee shots in the group.

name: Controlled Aggression
challenge_description: Take an aggressive line on one shot and execute it without penalty or disaster.

name: Long Putt Touch
challenge_description: From outside 20 feet, avoid both a 3-putt and leaving the second putt outside 3 feet.

name: Trouble Conversion
challenge_description: After finding rough, trees, or an awkward lie, still get the next shot onto a safe target.

name: Smart Birdie Look
challenge_description: Create a realistic birdie chance without taking on unnecessary danger.

name: Called Shot
challenge_description: Before one shot, call your intended shape or landing zone. Pull it off to score.

name: Deadpan
challenge_description: No celebration allowed if you complete your mission. Break character and lose the bonus.

name: Finger Guns
challenge_description: After a made putt, celebrate like a complete dork.

name: Commentary Mode
challenge_description: Another player narrates your next shot. If you succeed, both earn +1.

name: Walk-Off Energy
challenge_description: After your final putt, do not watch it. Start walking immediately. It still has to drop.

name: Club Twirl Tax
challenge_description: After your best full swing of the hole, you must club twirl. If the group agrees it was worthy, score it.

name: PGA Interview
challenge_description: After the hole, explain one shot as if you're in a post-round interview. Group votes if you committed to the bit.

name: Villain Arc
challenge_description: For one shot, openly announce an absurdly aggressive intention. If you pull it off, score it.

name: Caddie for a Moment
challenge_description: Let another player choose your club for one shot. If the result is acceptable and you still make bogey or better, score it.

name: Respect the Line
challenge_description: Before a putt, dramatically squat and read it like it contains the secrets of the universe. Then make it.

name: Signature Move
challenge_description: Declare one shot your "signature shot" before hitting it. If the group agrees it looked pure, score it.

name: Broadcaster Voice
challenge_description: Call your own shot in a golf-commentator voice before hitting it. If successful, score it.

name: Stone Face Par
challenge_description: Make par or better and react like it meant absolutely nothing.

name: Cartoon Confidence
challenge_description: On one putt outside 8 feet, confidently say "that's in" before the stroke. If it drops, score it.

name: Group Approval
challenge_description: Do one ridiculous but harmless celebration after completing your mission. If the group gives it a thumbs-up, score it.

name: Putter Grip Lock
challenge_description: Any putt inside 5 feet must be holed cleanly with no gimmies.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: First Off The Tee
challenge_description: You must tee off first regardless of honors.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Silent Setup
challenge_description: No talking during your setup, swing, or immediate result.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: No Lie Improvement
challenge_description: Ball must be played exactly as it lies unless required by safety rules.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Three-Putt Punisher
challenge_description: If you three-putt, add one extra stroke penalty.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: No Cart Assist
challenge_description: No cart ride to your ball after tee shot; walk to your next shot.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Gimme Magnet – Medium
challenge_description: Any putt inside 12 feet automatically counts as holed.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Gimme Magnet – Long
challenge_description: Any putt inside 18 feet automatically counts as holed.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: The Clutch
challenge_description: If you miss a putt inside 4 feet, tap it again and it still counts as one stroke.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Laser Line
challenge_description: Walk the exact putt line once with your putter touching the ground.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Foot Wedge – Deluxe
challenge_description: Move your ball 3 club lengths to improve the lie.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Power Drive – Rocket
challenge_description: After your drive, move the ball 3 club lengths forward.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Tree Friendly
challenge_description: If your ball hits a tree but stays in play, move it 10 yards forward.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Time Warp
challenge_description: Replay your previous shot, even if good. You must use the second result.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: The Glide
challenge_description: If approach finishes within one club length of green, drop onto the surface.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: The Walk-Off
challenge_description: If your ball finishes within 2 feet of hole, the putt is automatic.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Gravity Off
challenge_description: Your ball cannot roll backward away from the hole on this hole.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Tiger Vision
challenge_description: Once this hole, place your ball exactly where your shot should have landed.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: The Crowd Goes Wild
challenge_description: Others cheer before your shot; if they do, move your ball 10 yards forward.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: The Time Loop
challenge_description: Replay any one shot after seeing the result.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.

name: Ice Rink
challenge_description: All bunker shots on this hole slide directly onto the green.
notes: Inactive app card and not in current physical packs.
